title: Items not deductible; construction and application of provisions
doc_html:
§78.  Items not deductible; construction and application of provisions

The provisions of the preceding Sections dealing with "items not deductible" shall be construed and applied as qualifications, restrictions, and limitations upon any and all provisions elsewhere in this Chapter allowing deductions.
doc_text:
§78.  Items not deductible; construction and application of provisions
The provisions of the preceding Sections dealing with "items not deductible" shall be construed and applied as qualifications, restrictions, and limitations upon any and all provisions elsewhere in this Chapter allowing deductions.
